blocks.body: Past Simple: Questions and Short Answers — Did you...?, Did he...?, Yes, I did. / No, she didn't.

{"level":"A1–A2","intro":"In Past Simple questions, we put did before the subject and use the main verb in V1.","rules":[{"label":"Did + subject + V1?","color":"emerald","text":"The same pattern with did works for every subject.","example":"Did you call me? / Did she go home?"},{"label":"No V2 after did","color":"blue","text":"After did, do not use the past form.","example":"Did he work? / Did they see it?"},{"label":"Short answers","color":"amber","text":"In short answers, repeat did or didn't.","example":"Yes, I did. / No, she didn't."}]}

{"title":"1. Basic question patterns","intro":"In a question, put did first.","items":[{"label":"I / you / we / they","title":"Did ... + V1?","subtitle":"Did you call? / Did they stay here?"},{"label":"he / she / it","title":"Did ... + V1?","subtitle":"Did he work yesterday? / Did she see Tom?"},{"label":"Yes","title":"Yes, ... did.","subtitle":"Yes, I did. / Yes, she did."},{"label":"No","title":"No, ... didn't.","subtitle":"No, we didn't. / No, he didn't."}]}

{"title":"2. Why we ask these questions","sections":[{"label":"About past actions","color":"emerald","description":"Ask what happened yesterday, last week, or earlier.","examples":[{"en":"Did you watch the film yesterday?","ua":"A question about a finished past action."},{"en":"Did they arrive on time?","ua":"A question about a finished event."}]},{"label":"About details","color":"blue","description":"Ask about a finished event, visit, or trip.","examples":[{"en":"Did she visit Krakow last year?","ua":"A question about a past visit."},{"en":"Did he buy the tickets?","ua":"A question about a completed action."}]},{"label":"Short answers","color":"amber","description":"Do not repeat the whole sentence. A short model with did / didn't is enough.","examples":[{"en":"Did you finish the task? — Yes, I did.","ua":"A short positive answer."},{"en":"Did she call you? — No, she didn't.","ua":"A short negative answer."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Question and short answer","intro":"In the answer, repeat did or didn't, not the whole sentence.","rows":[{"en":"Did you call Anna?","ua":"Yes, I did. / No, I didn't.","note":"did → did / didn't"},{"en":"Did she go by bus?","ua":"Yes, she did. / No, she didn't.","note":"go after did"},{"en":"Did they see the message?","ua":"Yes, they did. / No, they didn't.","note":"same pattern for all subjects"}],"warning":"Do not say Did he went? or Yes, she do."}

{"title":"4. Common mistakes","items":[{"label":"Mistake 1","color":"rose","title":"Using V2 after did.","wrong":"❌ Did he went home?","right":"✅ Did he go home?"},{"label":"Mistake 2","color":"amber","title":"Not putting did at the start of the question.","wrong":"❌ You saw her yesterday?","right":"✅ Did you see her yesterday?"},{"label":"Mistake 3","color":"sky","title":"Using the wrong form in a short answer.","wrong":"❌ Yes, she do.","right":"✅ Yes, she did."}]}

{"title":"5. Short summary","items":["A Past Simple question = Did + subject + V1.","The pattern is the same for every subject.","After did, the main verb always stays in V1.","In short answers, repeat did / didn't."]}
